reasons: Diggie can reduce the value of Eudora's stun setup with team control immunity and shielding.
Eudora's burst is less reliable when her target is protected during the combo window.

proof.summary: Eudora wants to stun and burst a target, while Diggie can protect nearby allies with control immunity and shield during the key engage window.
worksBestWhen: Diggie saves Time Journey for Eudora's real combo.
Allies stay close enough to receive Diggie's protection.
failureCases: Eudora baits Diggie's ultimate before committing.
Eudora catches Diggie first or attacks while Time Journey is unavailable.

reasons: Kagura can cleanse debuffs and reposition, making Eudora's single-target combo harder to complete.
Kagura can punish Eudora's short cast range if Eudora misses stun timing.

proof.summary: Eudora wants a clean stun-to-burst sequence, while Kagura can cleanse and dash to break the expected combo timing.
worksBestWhen: Kagura saves her cleanse and dash for Eudora's stun attempt.
Kagura keeps umbrella spacing before entering Eudora's range.
failureCases: Kagura uses her escape too early.
Eudora catches Kagura when umbrella positioning is poor.

reasons: Chou can use control immunity timing to reduce the reliability of Eudora's stun.
If Chou reaches Eudora first, he can isolate her before she executes her burst combo.

proof.summary: Eudora wants enemies to enter stun range without immunity, while Chou can time Shunpo to pass through the crowd-control window and punish her immobility.
worksBestWhen: Chou flanks instead of walking directly through Eudora's vision.
failureCases: Chou mistimes Shunpo and gets stunned.
Eudora stays protected behind tank vision.

reasons: Lancelot can dodge or avoid Eudora's predictable stun-burst timing with mobility and invulnerability windows.
Eudora is vulnerable if Lancelot reaches her after her stun is unavailable.

proof.summary: Eudora wants to lock a target in a predictable combo window, while Lancelot can use mobility and timing to avoid the stun and punish her cooldown.
worksBestWhen: Lancelot waits for Eudora's stun attempt or enters from fog.
Lancelot has enough damage to punish Eudora quickly.
failureCases: Lancelot dives directly into Eudora's stun range.
Eudora holds stun until Lancelot's mobility is unavailable.

reasons: Natalia can pressure Eudora from conceal before Eudora chooses a burst target.
Silence and pickoff pressure can stop Eudora from freely setting up bush ambushes.

proof.summary: Eudora wants to control vision and ambush targets with stun burst, while Natalia can reverse that pressure by threatening Eudora from conceal.
worksBestWhen: Natalia controls the flank before Eudora sets an ambush.
Eudora is away from tank or support protection.
failureCases: Natalia is revealed before reaching Eudora.
Eudora stuns Natalia first or stays grouped with peel.
